name: Julie Hickman
body: LeeGod is going to bless you SO BIG buddy. I can’t wait to see your next post!!!faithfulness is really all about obedience and you are living it man. This is going to epic.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: I'm so excited for you! God is going to open your eyes and heart even more...which I'm sure seems impossible as you've seen Him in so many fresh, tangible ways in the last year. I'm praying for your joy and peace to block all fear and for God to protect your family while you're away.

name: Tina Hurst
body: Prayers continue for Lyla and for the seizures to stop. I’ve been where you are in relation to the trip. I’m also an extreme introvert and there were times when I was pushed outside of my comfort zone on that trip, no doubt. But the second you meet those kids and start pouring yourself into them, all of those insecurities are just gone. They are so thankful we are there! It’s amazing to see where these families live and what their day to day life is like and know the joy they have found In God. Your heart will be forever changed. Praying for God to move on this trip!

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Praying these seizures end for Lyla. May the trip for you, Lee, be meaningful and exceed your expectations. May God keep your whole family well. Safe travels.

name: Andrea VanSchepen
body: Awww. Lee!!! Safe travels! I am so excited for this trip for you. God is gonna do big things and I cannot wait to hear all of the ways when you return! Praying for you and this amazing opportunity!!! 🙏🏻 ❤️

name: Sondra Rush
body: Praying for you and each one of your family members. That God would give each of you your daily bread, encourage your hearts and minds, and continue to speak directly to you, Lee. He loves you with a never stopping, never giving up, always and forever love.
